title: Cognitive Bias Lab
description: An interactive platform for learning about cognitive biases through engaging exercises, simulations, and real-world examples.

title: Improve at Chess with AI
description: Custom GPT that provides personalised chess advice and analysis. Integrated with Chess.com and Lichess profiles and Stockfish. 10,000+ users.

title: Commute Check
description: Chrome extension that overlays public transit information (Luas, DART & Irish Rail) directly on Daft.ie property maps, helping you find a home near public transport in Ireland.
